title: Block of Sky Unofficial Port
description: Adds a block to render the sky
body:
# Simply adds a block that renders the sky
### PORTED WITH MAJOR HELP FROM AI

## Features
- Block of Sky - renders the sky of the dimension you are on
- Block of Void - renders the End Gateway effect
- Redstone controllable

## Images
![Underground house with sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51e909546b2e71e19a3868e74a0a91cdc839d7a8.png)
![Underground house with sky, some blocks of sky have been disabled with a redstone torch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa82b52eb003996c370149531f1fe420ea59ce5c.png)

## Compatibility
Sodium is recommended, however the mod should work without it.

Shaders are unsupported just like the original mod.

## Credits
This is a 1.21.1 port of Block of Sky found at https://modrinth.com/mod/block-of-sky by LuminaSapphira.

The original mod is itself a 1.19.2(+) port of Literal Sky Block originally found at https://github.com/nanite/Literal-Sky-Block. Some code from the fabric port also used, which can be found at https://github.com/Gaming32/literal-sky-block-fabric/. Both of these projects are licensed under LGPL-3.0.
